creator: support@unixworx.ca
text: UnixWorX System Design is a Vancouver, BC based consulting firm established in 1994. For over 20 years we've provided commercial support for BSD including FreeBSD, NetBSD and OpenBSD. Our specialties include Web Servers (Apache & TomCat), Content Management Systems (CMS), Email servers such as Sendmail & Postfix, DNS (BIND 8 & 9), Firewalls (PF and IPF), Routing, as well as application development and Perl / C++ Programing.  We operate our own server collocation facility situated on a GIG-E Backbone.  Additionally, the founder of the company, Glenn Graham is an author for O'Reilly Publishing.  We welcome new business! We invite you to visit http://www.networkinformation.com
